payload.title: Financial and Ridership Reports – September 2024
payload.description: LIRR financial and ridership report for September 2024, including budget performance, revenues, expenses, staffing, overtime, and performance indicators.

tool_args.label: Ridership vs Pre-COVID
tool_args.raw_text: Through September 2024, ridership was 55.5 million which was 16.6% above 2023 (18.6)% below 2019 pre-COVID levels (adjusted for the same number of workdays), and 5.6% above the forecast.

payload.claim_text: Through September 2024, LIRR ridership was 18.6% below 2019 pre-COVID levels adjusted for the same number of workdays.

tool_args.label: Grand Central Madison expenses in LIRR indicators
tool_args.raw_text: Expenses for Grand Central Madison Concourse Operating Company (GCMCOC) are included in LIRR performance indicator calculations.

tool_args.label: Preliminary close results subject to adjustment

payload.gap_text: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment.
payload.missing_information: Current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
payload.description: Financial results are preliminary and subject to post-close adjustments

evidence_refs.source_quote: Results are based on the preliminary close of the general ledger and are subject to review and adjustment. Please note that the current month's actuals do not include post-close adjustments, which will be captured in the subsequent month's YTD results.
